name: Product Page Clarity Before Cart
summary: Give shoppers the product promise, required selection, comparison support, and cart feedback before checkout.
useWhen: A product page needs copy tied to variant selection, comparison, and cart feedback nodes.
Generated copy must stay reviewable because product specs or store policy may change.
avoidWhen: The team needs approved production claims or final legal copy.
The page does not include product selection or cart feedback states.

structure.purpose: State the product promise without unsupported superlatives.
notes: Mark product-specific claims for productSpecs review.

structure.purpose: Explain the required choice or comparison task.
Tell the shopper exactly what to fix.
Confirm cart state and provide the next action.
notes: Mark checkout or support-policy wording for clientApproval review.

exampleTemplate.headline: {Product name} helps {audience} understand {primary product benefit}.
exampleTemplate.helperText: Choose {required option} before adding this item to your cart.
exampleTemplate.confirmation: Added to your cart. Review {selected option} before checkout.

confidence.reason: Derived from a small local fixture and intended as a candidate pattern for validation coverage.
